content:
# Bo luat Hinh su 2015, sua doi 2017 - Cac toi pham ve ma tuy

**Van ban goc:** `data/landing/legal/bo-luat-hinh-su-2015.pdf`
**Nguon tai lieu:** Cong Bao Chinh phu, Bo luat Hinh su so 100/2015/QH13 va Luat 12/2017/QH14 sua doi, bo sung
**URL tham chieu:** https://congbao.chinhphu.vn/noi-dung-van-ban-so-100-2015-qh13-18442 ; https://congbao.chinhphu.vn/van-ban/luat-so-12-2017-qh14-24289.htm
**Loai tai lieu:** legal

Chuong XX cua Bo luat Hinh su quy dinh nhom toi pham ve ma tuy. Cac dieu thuong duoc truy van gom: Dieu 247 ve toi trong cay thuoc phien, cay coca, cay can sa hoac cay khac co chua chat ma tuy; Dieu 248 ve toi san xuat trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 249 ve toi tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 250 ve toi van chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 251 ve toi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 252 ve toi chiem doat chat ma tuy; Dieu 253 ve tien chat dung vao viec san xuat trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu

ung vao viec san xuat trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 254 ve phuong tien, dung cu dung vao viec san xuat hoac su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 255 ve toi to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 256 ve toi chua chap viec su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 257 ve toi cuong buc nguoi khac su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; Dieu 258 ve toi loi keo nguoi khac su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; va Dieu 259 ve toi vi pham quy dinh ve quan ly chat ma tuy, tien chat, thuoc gay nghien, thuoc huong than.

Dieu 249 ve tang tru trai phep chat ma tuy la can cu chinh khi nguoi dung hoi "tang tru ma tuy bi phat the nao". Khung co ban cua toi nay la phat tu tu 01 nam den 05 nam neu hanh vi va khoi luong chat ma tuy thuoc truong hop luat dinh. Cac khung tang nang co the len 05-10 nam, 10-15 nam, hoac 15-20 nam tu tuy loai chat, khoi luong, so lan pham toi, tinh tiet co to chuc, tai pham nguy hiem, loi dung chuc vu quyen han, hoac su dung nguoi duoi 16 tuoi. Ngoai hinh phat tu, nguoi pham toi co the bi p
oi. Ngoai hinh phat tu, nguoi pham toi co the bi phat tien bo sung va bi cam dam nhiem chuc vu, cam hanh nghe hoac lam cong viec nhat dinh theo quy dinh.

Dieu 251 ve mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy co khung hinh phat nghiem khac hon hanh vi tang tru. Khung co ban la phat tu tu 02 nam den 07 nam. Neu co tinh tiet tang nang hoac khoi luong chat ma tuy lon, khung hinh phat co the tang len 07-15 nam, 15-20 nam, 20 nam, tu chung than hoac tu hinh tuy truong hop. Khi retrieval gap cau hoi ve "ban ma tuy", "mua ban ma tuy", "duong day mua ban", nen uu tien Dieu 251 hon Dieu 249.

Dieu 255 ve to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy ap dung khi hanh vi khong chi la ca nhan su dung ma tuy ma con sap xep, chuan bi, lôi keo, cung cap dia diem, dung cu hoac dieu kien de nguoi khac su dung trai phep chat ma tuy. Day la dieu thuong lien quan den cac vu viec bao chi neu "to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy". Khung hinh phat co ban la tu 02 nam den 07 nam va co the tang nang neu pham toi nhieu lan, doi voi nhieu nguoi, doi voi nguoi duoi 16 tuoi, gay ton hai suc khoe, gay chet ngu
i duoi 16 tuoi, gay ton hai suc khoe, gay chet nguoi hoac co tinh tiet nghiem trong khac.

Khi tra loi phap ly, pipeline can phan biet ro ba nhom hanh vi: tang tru la nam giu trai phep chat ma tuy; van chuyen la di chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy; mua ban la trao doi, ban, mua hoac moi gioi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy. Neu nguoi dung hoi ve danh muc chat va tien chat, nen ket hop voi Nghi dinh 57/2022/ND-CP. Neu nguoi dung hoi ve cai nghien, quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy, nen ket hop voi Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021 va Nghi dinh 105/2021/ND-CP.

# Luat Phong, chong ma tuy 2021

**Van ban goc:** `data/landing/legal/luat-phong-chong-ma-tuy-2021.pdf`
**Nguon tai lieu:** Cong Bao Chinh phu, Luat so 73/2021/QH14
**Loai tai lieu:** legal

Luat Phong, chong ma tuy nam 2021 quy dinh ve phong ngua, ngan chan, dau tranh chong toi pham va te nan ma tuy; kiem soat cac hoat dong hop phap lien quan den ma tuy; quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; cai nghien ma tuy; trach nhiem cua ca nhan, gia dinh, co quan, to chuc trong phong, chong ma tuy.

Van ban nay la nen tang phap ly chinh cho cac cau hoi ve khai niem chat ma tuy, tien chat, nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy, trach nhiem phong chong ma tuy trong cong dong va cac bien phap quan ly, giao duc, cai nghien. Khi tra loi cau hoi phap ly, can phan biet giua quy dinh chung cua Luat Phong, chong ma tuy va cac toi danh/hinh phat cu the trong Bo luat Hinh su.

Mot so chu de thuong gap: trach nhiem tuyen truyen phong chong ma tuy; quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; lap ho so cai nghien; cai nghien tu nguyen, cai nghien bat buoc; kiem soat tien chat va thuoc thu y, thuoc tan duoc co chua chat ma tuy; hop tac quoc te trong phong chong ma tuy.

# Nghi dinh 105/2021/ND-CP

**Van ban goc:** `data/landing/legal/nghi-dinh-105-2021.pdf`
**Nguon tai lieu:** Cong Bao Chinh phu, Nghi dinh so 105/2021/ND-CP
**Loai tai lieu:** legal

Nghi dinh 105/2021/ND-CP quy dinh chi tiet va huong dan thi hanh mot so dieu cua Luat Phong, chong ma tuy. Noi dung trong tam gom cong tac phoi hop cua cac co quan chuyen trach phong, chong toi pham ve ma tuy; kiem soat cac hoat dong hop phap lien quan den ma tuy; quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy; va nhung mau bieu, quy trinh hanh chinh co lien quan.

Tai lieu nay huu ich cho cac cau hoi ve cach co quan nha nuoc phoi hop trong phong chong ma tuy, trach nhiem cua tung bo nganh, va trinh tu quan ly nguoi su dung trai phep chat ma tuy. Neu truy van hoi ve quy trinh xet nghiem, thong bao, lap danh sach quan ly hoac chuyen ho so, ket qua retrieval nen uu tien Nghi dinh 105 vi day la van ban huong dan chi tiet cho Luat 73/2021/QH14.
Khi tao cau tra loi co citation, nen ghi nguon la Nghi dinh 105/2021/ND-CP va neu co the neu chuong/muc lien quan thay vi chi dan chung chung.

# Nghi dinh 57/2022/ND-CP

**Van ban goc:** `data/landing/legal/nghi-dinh-57-2022.pdf`
**Nguon tai lieu:** Cong Bao Chinh phu, Nghi dinh so 57/2022/ND-CP
**Loai tai lieu:** legal

Nghi dinh 57/2022/ND-CP quy dinh cac danh muc chat ma tuy va tien chat. Van ban ban hanh phu luc cac danh muc, bao gom nhom chat ma tuy tuyet doi cam su dung trong y hoc va doi song xa hoi, nhom chat ma tuy duoc su dung han che trong phan tich, kiem nghiem, nghien cuu khoa hoc, dieu tra toi pham hoac linh vuc y te theo quy dinh, va cac danh muc tien chat can kiem soat.

Trong he thong RAG, tai lieu nay nen duoc truy xuat khi cau hoi nhac den danh muc chat ma tuy, tien chat, heroin, cocaine, methamphetamine, MDMA, can sa, tien chat thiet yeu, hoac viec phan loai chat cam. Nghi dinh 57 khong phai van ban quy dinh hinh phat; neu nguoi dung hoi ve muc phat, pipeline can ket hop voi Bo luat Hinh su hoac tai lieu phap ly lien quan khac.

Khi tra loi, can canh bao rang danh muc chat ma tuy co the duoc sua doi, bo sung boi van ban moi hon, vi vay cac truy van yeu cau "moi nhat" nen kiem tra them van ban cap nhat sau Nghi dinh 57/2022/ND-CP.

# Cong an TP.HCM thong tin vu ca si Chi Dan, nguoi mau Andrea Aybar bi bat

**Source:** VOV
**URL:** https://vov.vn/phap-luat/cong-an-tphcm-thong-tin-vu-ca-si-chi-dan-nguoi-mau-andrea-aybar-bi-bat-post1135460.vov
**Crawled:** 2026-06-08T14:45:00+07:00
**Type:** news

Bai viet cua VOV tuong thuat thong tin Cong an TP.HCM cong bo ngay 14/11/2024 ve viec ca si Chi Dan va nguoi mau Andrea Aybar (An Tay) bi bat de dieu tra lien quan hanh vi to chuc su dung trai phep chat ma tuy. Vu viec duoc dat trong qua trinh mo rong chuyen an VN10 ve duong day van chuyen ma tuy tu Phap ve Viet Nam qua san bay Tan Son Nhat. Theo noi dung bai bao, co quan cong an cho biet qua qua trinh lan theo dong chay ma tuy, luc luong chuc nang da tiep tuc triet pha nhieu duong day, bang nho
ng da tiep tuc triet pha nhieu duong day, bang nhom mua ban va van chuyen trai phep chat ma tuy.

Noi dung nay phu hop voi corpus RAG vi no cung cap boi canh ve viec nguoi noi tieng bi dieu tra, toi danh duoc nhac den, co quan cong bo thong tin va moi lien he voi chuyen an lon. Khi tra loi, he thong can dien dat than trong: cac thong tin ve ca nhan can gan voi nguon bao chi va trang thai to tung tai thoi diem bai viet, tranh suy dien vuot qua noi dung da cong bo.

# Bat giam dien vien Huu Tin vi lien quan ma tuy

**Source:** Bao Nguoi Lao Dong
**URL:** https://nld.com.vn/phap-luat/bat-giam-dien-vien-huu-tin-vi-lien-quan-ma-tuy-20220617202258452.htm
**Crawled:** 2026-06-08T14:45:00+07:00
**Type:** news

Bai bao thong tin Cong an quan 8, TP.HCM bat tam giam dien vien Huu Tin va mot nguoi khac do lien quan den hanh vi to chuc, tang tru va su dung trai phep chat ma tuy. Theo phan tom tat noi dung, luc kiem tra can ho, luc luong chuc nang phat hien mot so vat chung nghi la ma tuy va nhieu nguoi co mat trong phong. Bai viet cung de cap viec co quan dieu tra tiep tuc lam ro vai tro cua tung nguoi trong vu viec.

Day la mot nguon tin phu hop cho truy van ve nghe si Viet Nam lien quan ma tuy, dac biet voi cac cau hoi ve dien vien Huu Tin, su kien nam 2022, hanh vi bi dieu tra va boi canh phap ly. Khi dua vao cau tra loi RAG, can ghi ro day la thong tin bao chi dua theo co quan cong an tai thoi diem dang tin, khong mo rong thanh ket luan ngoai pham vi bai bao.

# Dien vien Le Hang bi bat vi mua ban ma tuy

**Source:** Bao Nguoi Lao Dong
**URL:** https://nld.com.vn/phap-luat/dien-vien-le-hang-bi-bat-vi-mua-ban-ma-tuy-20230423173501249.htm
**Crawled:** 2026-06-08T14:45:00+07:00
**Type:** news

Bai bao dua tin ve viec dien vien Bui Thi Le Hang bi bat trong nam 2023 do hanh vi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy. Noi dung bai viet nhac den qua trinh luc luong canh sat dieu tra toi pham ve ma tuy Cong an quan Dong Da phat hien, bat giu doi tuong tai khu vuc Kham Thien va thu giu vat chung lien quan. Bai viet cung neu rang tai co quan cong an, bi can khai nhan nguon goc so ma tuy va muc dich ban lai cho khach.

Trong pipeline RAG, tai lieu nay giup tra loi cac cau hoi ve truong hop Le Hang, nhom nghe si/dien vien bi xu ly vi ma tuy, va su khac nhau giua hanh vi su dung, tang tru, to chuc su dung voi mua ban trai phep chat ma tuy. Cau tra loi sinh ra tu nguon nay can co citation va chi khang dinh cac chi tiet da duoc bai bao neu.

# Vu ca si Chau Viet Cuong va he qua cua viec su dung ma tuy tong hop

**Source:** Bao Cong an Nhan dan
**URL:** https://cand.com.vn/Vu-an-noi-tieng/He-qua-cua-loi-song-buong-tha-i467319/
**Crawled:** 2026-06-08T14:45:00+07:00
**Type:** news

Bai viet cua Bao Cong an Nhan dan phan tich vu an lien quan ca si Chau Viet Cuong. Noi dung bai bao neu boi canh su dung ma tuy tong hop, hien tuong ao giac va hau qua nghiem trong dan den cai chet cua nan nhan. Bai viet dat vu viec trong goc nhin canh bao ve loi song buong tha, tac hai cua ma tuy va trach nhiem hinh su khi hanh vi su dung chat kich thich dan den toi pham khac.

Tai lieu nay huu ich cho RAG khi nguoi dung hoi ve cac vu an nghe si lien quan ma tuy trong qua khu, ve rui ro cua ma tuy tong hop, hoac ve cach mot vu viec su dung ma tuy co the phat sinh hau qua hinh su nghiem trong hon. He thong can tranh ke lai chi tiet giat gan khong can thiet, tap trung vao thong tin phap ly, tac hai va citation den nguon.

# Nha thiet ke Nguyen Cong Tri bi bat vi lien quan ma tuy

**Source:** VnExpress
**URL:** https://vnexpress.net/nha-thiet-ke-nguyen-cong-tri-bi-bat-vi-lien-quan-ma-tuy-4917929.html
**Crawled:** 2026-06-08T14:45:00+07:00
**Type:** news

Bai viet cua VnExpress dang ngay 23/7/2025 dua tin nha thiet ke Nguyen Cong Tri bi bat qua tang su dung ma tuy tai nha rieng trong qua trinh canh sat dieu tra mot duong day mua ban chat cam. Bai viet cung neu mot so thong tin nghe nghiep, tam anh huong trong linh vuc thoi trang va boi canh co quan cong an mo rong dieu tra duong day lien quan. Day la nguon tin gan thoi diem hien dai hon trong corpus, phu hop voi cac cau hoi ve nguoi noi tieng trong linh vuc thoi trang lien quan ma tuy.

Khi su dung trong he thong RAG, can trinh bay day la thong tin theo VnExpress va gan voi ngay dang bai. Neu cau hoi yeu cau trang thai phap ly moi nhat, he thong nen khuyen nghi kiem tra nguon cap nhap moi hon vi to tung co the thay doi sau ngay bai bao duoc cong bo.
